arts.ttl: Liverpool vs Everton - Premier League: Live score, team news and updates with Alisson ruled out of Merseyside derby as Reds look to bounce back from Carabao Cup final defeat and move 12 points clear
arts.sum: Follow Mail Sport's live blog for the latest score, team news and updates as Liverpool welcome Merseyside rivals Everton to Anfield in the Premier League.

arts.ttl: Paul Merson slams Liverpool's 'CRIMINAL' treatment of Mohamed Salah, Virgil Van Dijk and Trent Alexander-Arnold in contract saga
arts.sum: Paul Merson has hit out at Liverpool for allowing the contracts of Mohamed Salah, Virgil Van Dijk and Trent Alexander-Arnold to expire. All three players can leave Anfield on free deals this summer.

arts.ttl: Everton, West Ham 'keen' on summer deal for experienced Man United centre-back
arts.sum: Everton and West Ham United are reportedly both interested in signing Manchester United centre-back Victor Lindelof on a free transfer.

arts.ttl: Liverpool transfer news: Arne Slot's side 'exploring eye-catching move' for Real Sociedad attacker
arts.sum: Liverpool are reportedly keen to sign Real Sociedad attacker Takefusa Kubo during this summer's transfer window.
